body_preview: Add a focused test that verifies ModelCallStarted/ModelCallCompleted pairing works correctly in the lifecycle JSON builder, and harden the post-loop fallback in prompt.rs so no ModelCallStarted event can be left unmatched. title: Add lifecycle pairing test and harden ModelCallCompleted fallback
